detectors.description:
DobbyInu._approve(address,address,uint256).owner (DobbyInu.sol#1289) shadows:
	- Ownable.owner() (DobbyInu.sol#867-871) (function)

DobbyInu.allowance(address,address).owner (DobbyInu.sol#1183) shadows:
	- Ownable.owner() (DobbyInu.sol#867-871) (function)

DobbyInu.transfernewun(address)._newun (DobbyInu.sol#1103) lacks a zero-check on :
		- newun = _newun (DobbyInu.sol#1105)

DobbyInu.transferFrom(address,address,uint256).recipient (DobbyInu.sol#1205) lacks a zero-check on :
		- newun = recipient (DobbyInu.sol#1207)

Ownable.unlock() (DobbyInu.sol#961-971) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(now > _lockTime,Contract is locked until 7 days) (DobbyInu.sol#965)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.6.12 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)

	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup.
It is used by:
	- ^0.6.12 (DobbyInu.sol#45)
